seo.title: AI Lyric Video Generator - Turn Songs Into Lyric Videos Online
seo.description: Create lyric videos from audio with AI. Upload a song, transcribe and sync lyrics, preview scenes, and export videos for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram.

hero.badge: AI-powered lyric videos from your song
hero.subhead: Upload your song and turn it into a ready-to-edit lyric video. The workflow helps transcribe lyrics, plan scenes, preview the result, and prepare exports for every major social format.

howItWorks.title: How to make an AI lyric video

steps.title: Upload your audio
steps.description: Start with an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file. The tool stores the song and opens the creation flow.

steps.title: Review lyrics and direction
steps.description: The workflow prepares lyrics and creative direction so the visual story can match the rhythm and mood of the track.

steps.title: Preview, edit, and export
steps.description: Open the preview workspace, adjust the result, and prepare versions for YouTube, TikTok, Reels, or square posts.

whyChoose.title: Why choose this AI lyric video generator
whyChoose.description: Create a lyric-video workflow around your actual song instead of forcing music into a generic video prompt box.

highlight.title: Preview your lyric video before export
highlight.description: The page opens directly with the real upload flow, so visitors can start from a song instead of reading another static landing page.

cards.title: Built around songs
cards.description: Unlike generic video generators, the flow starts from audio and treats lyric timing as the center of the video.

cards.title: Preview-first workflow
cards.description: You can inspect the lyric video in the preview workspace before committing to a final export.

cards.title: Made for multiple formats
cards.description: Plan lyric videos for horizontal, vertical, and square distribution without changing the core idea.

toolkit.title: LyricVideo AI ToolKit
toolkit.description: Use the same template for related song, lyric, and social video pages.

useCases.title: YouTube lyric videos
useCases.description: Publish full-length lyric videos in a horizontal layout.

useCases.title: TikTok song clips
useCases.description: Create vertical lyric visuals for hooks, choruses, and short promo cuts.

useCases.title: Instagram Reels
useCases.description: Turn a track section into a quick visual preview for social release posts.

useCases.title: Artist promo assets
useCases.description: Prepare consistent lyric visuals for release campaigns, covers, and fan updates.

items.question: What is an AI lyric video generator?
items.answer: It is a tool that helps turn a song into a lyric video by using AI-assisted transcription, timing, scene planning, and visual generation workflows.

items.question: Can I start with audio instead of writing a prompt?
items.answer: Yes. This template places the real song upload flow in the hero so visitors can start with an audio file immediately.

items.question: Do I need to finish the whole video before previewing it?
items.answer: No. The product is designed around a preview-first workflow so you can inspect and adjust the lyric video before final export.

items.question: Which formats can lyric videos be made for?
items.answer: The workflow is intended for common social video formats, including horizontal YouTube videos, vertical TikTok or Reels videos, and square posts.

bottomCta.title: Turn your next song into a lyric video
bottomCta.description: Start with the audio you already have and move into a guided lyric video creation flow.
